assertionResults.reason: Ctrl+5 keyboard chord did not dispatch in tuistory, but Notes tab/list/detail behavior was verified via fallback navigation and the targeted Pilot regression test passed.

steps.observed: Remained on conversation tab; shortcut did not switch tabs

steps.action: Fallback click Notes tab and select 'Continuation of Care'
steps.expected: Notes list renders and detail view opens selected note body
steps.observed: Notes list rendered; selecting note opened full body in DetailView

assertionResults.reason: Ctrl+A behavior was observed in tuistory, but Ctrl+Shift+A was not reliably distinguishable in this terminal automation session; targeted Pilot regression test for account auth shortcut behavior passed.

steps.expected: Distinct re-auth status for current account
steps.observed: No reliably distinct Ctrl+Shift behavior in this tuistory session

assertionResults.reason: Ctrl+4/Ctrl+3 keyboard dispatch was unreliable in tuistory, so tab-state preservation was validated with strongest available evidence: fallback tab navigation captures plus four focused Pilot tab-state tests, all passing.

steps.action: Attempt keyboard path Ctrl+4 then Ctrl+3 from Gmail context
steps.observed: Keyboard chords did not produce reliable tab switching in tuistory session

steps.expected: Tabs switch correctly via UI controls
steps.observed: Calendar and Gmail tabs switched via click fallback

steps.action: Run targeted Pilot tests for tab state: test_tab_state_saved_on_switch, test_tab_state_restored_on_switch_back, test_tab_state_messages_retained_across_switches, test_save_tab_state_stores_conv_and_messages

evidence.evidenceQuality: High for logic correctness (deterministic Pilot tests directly assert save/restore behavior), medium for live keyboard-path UX due known tuistory chord limitations.

frictions.description: tuistory did not reliably dispatch Ctrl+number (Ctrl+5, Ctrl+4, Ctrl+3) and Ctrl+Shift+A chords in this session.
frictions.resolution: Used AGENTS-approved pytest/Textual Pilot fallback tests for definitive pass/fail determination.

frictions.description: TUI status intermittently showed 'Server unreachable — press Ctrl+R to retry' during regression checks.
frictions.resolution: Retried 127.0.0.1 health checks and continued validation using deterministic headless Pilot tests for assertions requiring strong evidence.

summary: Retested 3 assertions (VAL-REGR-001, VAL-REGR-004, VAL-CROSS-011): all 3 marked pass using tuistory attempts plus AGENTS-approved pytest/Pilot fallback evidence where keyboard dispatch was unreliable.
